title: Lazy Ketchup Tart
description: A savory and crispy Australian dish featuring ketchup as the main ingredient, perfect for a lazy Sunday, diabetic-friendly, and easy to make.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a small tart pan with shortening or cooking spray.
In a large bowl, mix ketchup and vegetable oil until well combined. Stir in flour, butter, sugar, and beaten eggs. If desired, add vanilla extract for extra flavor.
Pour the mixture into prepared tart shell. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and set.
Allow to cool before serving. Serve with whipped cream or a dollop of sour cream as per personal preference.
